footnotes.text: White horse: this horseman with the bow symbolizes Christ and the victory of His word. Cf. 19, 11-13.

A measure of wheat for a denarius: a famine price. Perhaps "twenty-five cents for a five-cent loaf of bread" might indicate the prices signified. Do not harm the wine and the oil: these are not, like bread, necessary for life.
Pale-green horse: this horseman symbolizes death, or rather pestilence. There was given him power, etc.: the Greek text reads, "power was given them over a fourth part of the earth.
Wrath of the Lamb: the Lamb has again become the Lion.
